full_text:
Office hours changed in 9 districts due to heatwave in Karnataka
Karnataka is witnessing rising temperatures, with North Karnataka facing intense heat and possible heatwave conditions. In response, the government has revised office hours in nine districts from 8 AM to 1:30 PM. The weather department has advised people to avoid stepping out during peak afternoon hours and take precautions against heat-related illnesses.
